message:
fix(web): improve rendering system robustness and cleanup

VirtualScroller (VirtualScroller.ts):
- Fix animationFrameId type to support both browser RAF and setTimeout
  for web worker environments where requestAnimationFrame may not exist
- Add proper type casting in cancelRaf for TypeScript compatibility
- This enables momentum scrolling to work correctly in worker contexts

CanvasSequenceGridRenderer (CanvasSequenceGridRenderer.ts):
- Add PostProcessPipeline disposal when replacing pipeline to prevent
  WebGL context leaks when CRT effects are toggled or updated
- Add dispose() call for postProcess in renderer cleanup to release
  GPU resources when component unmounts
- Prevents "too many WebGL contexts" errors on long-running sessions

GlyphAtlas (GlyphAtlas.ts):
- Add OffscreenCanvas 2D context fallback for edge cases where
  OffscreenCanvas exists but getContext('2d') returns null
- Falls back to DOM canvas when OffscreenCanvas context fails
- Improves compatibility with unusual browser configurations
- Maintains proper error handling if no canvas context available

PostProcessPipeline (PostProcessPipeline.ts):
- Add 'disabled' flag to prevent repeated WebGL2 init retries on
  devices that don't support it (e.g., older iOS Safari)
- Add dispose() method to properly release WebGL resources:
  - Deletes program, texture, buffer, and VAO
  - Calls WEBGL_lose_context to release GPU context
  - Nulls all references to aid garbage collection
- Check disabled flag in process() to skip processing entirely
- Improves memory usage and prevents console spam on unsupported devices

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
